summary: The correct diagnostic test for rabies in corneal scrapings is real-time reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR). It directly detects rabies viral RNA, providing rapid and accurate identification of active infection without relying on immune responses that may indicate prior exposure rather than present illness.
